items.angular: Angular is a powerful framework for complex enterprise web applications with TypeScript, modular architecture, and a rich ecosystem.
items.vue: Vue.js combines simplicity with flexibility – ideal for performant, reactive user interfaces and single-page applications.
items.react: React enables component-based UIs with high reusability. Perfect for dynamic, data-driven web applications.
items.java: Java is a robust, platform-independent language for stable and scalable enterprise applications with high security requirements.
items.csharp: C# combined with .NET provides a powerful platform for enterprise software, APIs, and cloud applications.
items.kotlin: Kotlin is modern, concise, and fully interoperable with Java – ideal for Android development and backend services.
items.python: Python excels in versatility: from data science to automation, web backends, and AI applications.
items.node: Node.js enables server-side JavaScript with high performance – perfect for real-time applications and microservices.
items.dotnet: .NET Core is a cross-platform framework for high-performance APIs, cloud services, and enterprise applications.
items.php: PHP is a widely-used scripting language for server-side web development – ideal for portals, CMS, and business websites.
items.spring: Spring provides a comprehensive Java framework for enterprise applications with dependency injection and microservice architecture.
items.azure_openai: Azure OpenAI brings GPT models into your enterprise infrastructure – secure, scalable, and GDPR-compliant.
items.ollama: Ollama enables local execution of LLMs – full data control without cloud dependency.
items.azure: Microsoft Azure offers comprehensive cloud services for computing, storage, AI, and DevOps.
items.aws: Amazon Web Services is the leading cloud platform with over 200 services for every business size.
items.gcp: Google Cloud Platform excels at big data, machine learning, and containerized infrastructure.
items.multicloud: Multi-cloud strategies combine the strengths of different providers for maximum flexibility and resilience.

teamPage.title: The people behind Consulsoft
teamPage.subtitle: Two founders, one vision: Modern software development at the highest level. We combine technical excellence with entrepreneurial thinking.

naumche.name: Naumche Joshevski
naumche.bio1: Naumche is a full-stack developer with a passion for clean architecture and scalable systems. With years of experience in enterprise projects, he brings deep technical knowledge and strategic thinking together.
naumche.bio2: As Managing Director, he oversees the technical direction of Consulsoft and ensures that every project meets the highest quality standards. His expertise lies in modern web technologies, cloud architectures, and agile project management.
naumche.skills: Angular, Vue.js, TypeScript, Java, Spring Boot, Cloud Architecture, Agile Leadership

dimitar.name: Dimitar Manev
dimitar.bio1: Dimitar is an experienced software developer with a strong focus on backend systems and DevOps. He loves turning complex problems into elegant, maintainable solutions.
dimitar.bio2: As co-founder of Consulsoft, he drives innovation and quality in every project. His strengths lie in developing robust APIs, database design, and business process automation.
dimitar.skills: C#, .NET Core, Python, Kotlin, DevOps, CI/CD, Microservices, Database Design

projects.title: Selected work
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects we've delivered for our clients across different industries.

erp.title: Enterprise ERP Platform
erp.short: Complete ERP system for a mid-sized manufacturing company with real-time analytics and process automation.
erp.description1: Our client, a mid-sized manufacturing company with over 500 employees, needed a modern ERP system to replace their outdated legacy infrastructure. The goal was to digitize the entire value chain — from procurement and production planning to sales and financial reporting.
erp.description2: We developed a modular, cloud-native platform built on Angular and Spring Boot, deployed on Azure. The system features real-time dashboards, automated workflows, and seamless integration with existing third-party systems via REST APIs.
erp.challenge: Replace a 15-year-old legacy system without disrupting daily operations. Over 200 business processes needed to be mapped and modernized.
erp.solution: Phased migration with parallel operation. Modular architecture allowed us to replace components individually while maintaining full system availability.
erp.results: 40% faster order processing | 60% reduction in manual data entry | 99.9% system uptime | ROI achieved within 14 months

logistics.title: Smart Logistics Platform
logistics.short: Real-time tracking and route optimization for a fleet of 200+ vehicles across Europe.
logistics.description1: A European logistics provider needed a platform to optimize their fleet operations across 8 countries. The existing system couldn't handle the complexity of real-time tracking, dynamic route planning, and compliance requirements across multiple jurisdictions.
logistics.description2: We built a high-performance platform using Vue.js and Kotlin, deployed on AWS with Kubernetes. The system processes thousands of GPS updates per second, calculates optimal routes using machine learning, and provides real-time visibility into the entire fleet.
logistics.challenge: Process 10,000+ GPS events per second with sub-second latency while calculating optimal routes across 8 countries with different regulations.
logistics.solution: Event-driven architecture with Redis Streams for real-time processing. ML-based route optimization that considers traffic, weather, regulations, and driver rest times.
logistics.results: 23% reduction in fuel costs | 18% more deliveries per day | Real-time tracking for 200+ vehicles | Compliance automation across 8 countries

healthportal.title: Digital Health Portal
healthportal.short: Patient-facing health platform with AI-powered symptom assessment and appointment booking.
healthportal.description1: A healthcare network with 45 clinics needed a unified patient portal to streamline appointment booking, provide digital health records access, and reduce the burden on administrative staff. Patient satisfaction scores were declining due to long wait times and manual processes.
healthportal.description2: We developed a HIPAA/GDPR-compliant portal using React and Python, with Azure as the cloud backbone. The platform includes an AI-powered symptom checker, intelligent appointment scheduling, secure messaging with providers, and integration with existing hospital information systems via FHIR standards.
healthportal.challenge: Build a platform that meets strict healthcare compliance requirements (GDPR, medical device regulations) while providing an intuitive consumer-grade experience.
healthportal.solution: Compliance-first architecture with end-to-end encryption, audit logging, and role-based access. AI models trained on anonymized clinical data for symptom assessment.
healthportal.results: 35% reduction in no-show appointments | 50% fewer administrative phone calls | Patient satisfaction up from 3.2 to 4.7/5 | Fully GDPR and medical device compliant
